name: 04-30-home-real-coordinate-governance-review
title: Home Real-coordinate Governance Review
description: 复盘 Home 系统与真实坐标空间主线的关系，防止演化成无锚点个人主页。
creator: lijin
notes: Governance review completed 2026-04-30. Existing Home implementation aligned with product-direction-decision.md governance framework. Access control, member classification, nonliving silence, and owner sovereignty verified. No code changes required. Three minor documentation gaps documented but not blocking.

governance_verification.owner_sovereignty: Owner controls all aspects - members, access, content verified
governance_verification.no_social_network: No friend system, no global messaging confirmed

gaps_document: Coordinate requirement documentation (internal requirement, not in schema)
Public vs private payload differentiation (documentation gap)
Discovery filter confirmation (Home type not in public filters)
done: Reviewed home.py (305 lines) - Home, HomeMember, HomeVisit models
Reviewed homes.py contracts (125 lines) - API request/response schemas
